data.body: Completion verifier correctly found two missing acceptance proofs after change 864. Follow-up adds a regression plan derived from 3ba0/0734 using AnalyzerResult, jscpd, Unavailable(reason, accruing_since), git metrics, and module_size_trend; tests/unit/test_plan_review.py proves T8 abstains and E2 remains routed. plan_review_E2.md now explicitly assigns missing field provenance and computation/aggregation protocols to E2. Local evidence: full test_plan_review.py 99 passed; focused regression 6 passed; make lint and make typecheck passed.
